title: Lots of misc qustions
wikitext:
[]: Lots of misc qustions             Quote Post by Sack Man » Sun Aug 15, 2004 5:03 am As per the title, just a load of random questions. that magi, why are they designed the way they are? They are computers yet are overflowying with pipes, not a typical computer design. They were designed and created before the death of (forget her name)'s mother, yet her brain was planted in it, how can you design and create a system which you cannot complete? Why is her brain used? The eva's, are part robot, part angel, sort of like a terminator, but in the very first episode the head is cut off of eva 1, how do they reattach such a thing, considering it is 'alive'. Why do the eva's have to sync with a pilot? Surely the pilot is controlling the eva with controls, yet they need to have a clear mind to do this. why do they always say at least 52 times an episode 'This cant be happening, its impossible!'? Nerv is underground, but why is there a huge gap between it and above ground? Are they trying to simulate a world underground without it being in a building of sorts?

[]: Re: Lots of misc qustions             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Aug 15, 2004 7:35 am that magi, why are they designed the way they are? They are computers yet are overflowying with pipes, not a typical computer design.

[]: Re: Lots of misc qustions             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 15, 2004 2:14 pm Sack Man wrote: that magi, why are they designed the way they are? They are computers yet are overflowying with pipes, not a typical computer design.

Article: Lots of misc qustions
[]: Lots of misc qustions             Quote Post by Sack Man » Sun Aug 15, 2004 5:03 am As per the title, just a load of random questions. that magi, why are they designed the way they are? They are computers yet are overflowying with pipes, not a typical computer design. They were designed and created before the death of (forget her name)'s mother, yet her brain was planted in it, how can you design and create a system which you cannot complete? Why is her brain used? The eva's, are part robot, part angel, sort of like a terminator, but in the very first episode the head is cut off of eva 1, how do they reattach such a thing, considering it is 'alive'. Why do the eva's have to sync with a pilot? Surely the pilot is controlling the eva with controls, yet they need to have a clear mind to do this. why do they always say at least 52 times an episode 'This cant be happening, its impossible!'? Nerv is underground, but why is there a huge gap between it and above ground? Are they trying to simulate a world underground without it being in a building of sorts?

[]: Re: Lots of misc qustions             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Aug 15, 2004 7:35 am that magi, why are they designed the way they are? They are computers yet are overflowying with pipes, not a typical computer design.
